title: cerastium fontanum var. angustifolium
intro: Cerastium fontanum var. angustifolium, also known as a narrow-leaved mouse-ear chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cerastium fontanum var. angustifolium include its ability to soothe irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and immune function.
